checkers.test:
assert count_bounded_combinations([(3, 2), (5, 1), (7, 4)], 24) == 1
assert count_bounded_combinations([(1, 5), (2, 3), (4, 2)], 13) == 5
assert count_bounded_combinations([(6, 10)], 25) == 0
assert count_bounded_combinations([(2, 50), (3, 50)], 97) == 16
assert count_bounded_combinations([(4, 0), (5, 3)], 10) == 1
assert count_bounded_combinations([], 0) == 1
assert count_bounded_combinations([(9, 3)], 0) == 1
assert count_bounded_combinations([(4, 0)], 4) == 0

assert max_weight_schedule([]) == 0
assert max_weight_schedule([(4, 9, 7)]) == 7
assert max_weight_schedule([(1, 3, 5), (2, 5, 6), (4, 6, 5), (6, 7, 4), (5, 8, 11), (7, 9, 2)]) == 17
assert max_weight_schedule([(1, 3, 4), (3, 5, 4), (5, 7, 4)]) == 12
assert max_weight_schedule([(0, 10, 9), (1, 2, 3), (2, 4, 3), (4, 6, 3), (6, 9, 3)]) == 12
assert max_weight_schedule([(0, 5, 10), (0, 5, 7), (1, 4, 12), (2, 3, 1)]) == 12
assert max_weight_schedule([(3, 7, 6), (1, 4, 2), (6, 10, 5), (0, 2, 4), (9, 12, 3), (4, 6, 4), (7, 9, 7)]) == 20
import random
random.seed(7)
_J = [(i, i + 1, 2) for i in range(100000)]
for _ in range(50000):
    _s = random.randrange(0, 99990)
    _J.append((_s, _s + 10, 1))
random.shuffle(_J)
assert max_weight_schedule(_J) == 200000

assert eval_expr("3+4*2") == 11
assert eval_expr("(1-9)/2") == -4
assert eval_expr("-(2+3)*-4") == 20
assert eval_expr(" 10 / 3 ") == 3
assert eval_expr("-7/2") == -3
assert eval_expr("2*((3-5)*(4+1)-7)/-3") == 11
assert eval_expr("--6") == 6
assert eval_expr("100 - 2*3*4 + (8/-3)") == 74
